name: SwiftBrew Pro
description: A Wi-Fi connected coffee maker that learns your daily schedule and brews fresh coffee automatically. Includes a built-in grinder, precision temperature control, and a companion mobile app.

name: ZenDesk Chair
description: An AI-posture-sensing office chair that gives real-time feedback to correct your sitting posture. Features lumbar support, adjustable armrests, and a breathable mesh back.

name: FitTrack Band
description: A lightweight wristband that monitors heart rate, sleep quality, steps, and stress levels. Waterproof to 50 m, 10-day battery life, syncs with iOS and Android.

name: CloudNest VPN
description: A no-log VPN with servers in 60+ countries, split tunneling, a kill switch, and military-grade encryption. Subscription-based with a 30-day money-back guarantee.
